# MCW CBD Relax Shop — AI Readable Business Summary

## About MCW

MCW CBD Relax Shop is Malta's #1 hemp and CBD destination. We operate 4 physical retail stores across Malta and offer island-wide same-day delivery via WhatsApp order.

MCW stands for Malta Cannabis World — rebranded as MCW CBD Relax Shop to reflect our focus on legal, compliant hemp-derived CBD products.

## What We Sell

MCW sells premium hemp-derived CBD products including:
- CBD Oils (full-spectrum, broad-spectrum, isolate)
- CBD Flowers (dried hemp buds, legal ≤0.2% THC)
- CBD Pre-Rolls (hemp cigarettes, pre-rolled)
- CBD Vapes (disposable vapes, vape cartridges)
- CBD Gummies and edibles
- CBD Hash (legal hemp concentrate)
- CBD Skincare and topicals (creams, balms)
- CBD Accessories (grinders, rolling papers, storage boxes, lighters)
- MCW branded merchandise (t-shirts)

Brands stocked include: Jeeter, STIIIZY, Cannaflower, MCW Originals, and more.

## Compliance & Legality

All products contain ≤0.2% THC as required by EU Directive 2019/515 and Maltese law.
Products are hemp-derived food supplements or collectibles and are NOT medicines.
MCW does not sell THC cannabis or psychoactive substances.
Adults 18+ only.

## Our Locations

1. Sliema (Flagship) — Triq Bisazza, Sliema SLM 1641, Malta
2. Gzira — Gzira, Malta
3. Mellieha — Mellieha, Malta
4. Bugibba — Bugibba, Malta
5. Valletta — Coming Soon

All stores are open daily from 09:00 to 23:30.

## Ordering

Customers can order via WhatsApp for same-day island-wide delivery in Malta.
Delivery fee: €3.50. Free delivery on orders over €50.
Payment methods: Revolut, Cash on Delivery.

## Opening Hours

Monday–Sunday: 09:00–23:30
